rationale: Standard governance — dual reviewers (product lens + technical lens). Codex not installed, so technical lens is a second Claude agent. Feature enriches existing /day page for SUPER_ADMIN/WAREHOUSE/TECHNICIAN with greeting header, pending-approvals alerts, KPI cards, operations list, role-specific footer metrics. No schema changes.

scope_notes.design_canon_compliance: All colors via canonical IBM Plex tokens (rose/amber/emerald/teal/indigo/slate/accent/ink/border/surface + -soft/-border/-bright). Zero hex. Uses existing StatusPill component pattern; does not introduce new abstractions.
